title: ‘Europe cannot afford bureaucratic paralysis’: EU strikes defence simplification deal
content: Facing Russian aggression and US retreat, the EU is planning to streamline permits, cut bureaucracy and make defence procurement and transfers across member states easier.
snippet: Facing Russian aggression and US retreat, the EU is planning to streamline permits, cut bureaucracy and make defence procurement and transfers across member states easier.

title: Defying Russia: Poland and Germany plan massive offshore wind farms in the Baltic Sea
content: Despite hybrid attacks from Russia, Poland is betting on offshore wind power from the Baltic Sea. At a forum in Berlin, one message was clear: the region could become Europe’s next major energy hub. Will Europe seize this opportunity?
snippet: Despite hybrid attacks from Russia, Poland is betting on offshore wind power from the Baltic Sea. At a forum in Berlin, one message was clear: the region could become Europe’s next major energy hub.

title: Fake article claims Mbappé made sexual harassment allegations against Macron

title: Hungary submits revised EU recovery plan as MEPs demand transparency over €16.4bn in frozen funds

title: France bars Israel's Smotrich as others push back against Israeli settlement expansion

title: What is 'Kushner Island' and why are Albanians protesting about it?
